name: Festive Cocoa Cards
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Molasses or dark corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the molasses, egg, and vanilla extract.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, cocoa, and baking soda.
4. Stir the dry ingredients into the butter mixture until well blended.
5. Chill the dough for 1 hour.
6. On a lightly floured surface, roll the dough out to form an oblong measuring 12 x 15 inches.
7. Cut the dough into 12 rectangles measuring 3 x 5 inches.
8. Place the rectangles on greased cookie sheets.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes, or until firm to the touch.
10. Allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheet.
11. Write names or greetings on each cookie.
This recipe makes 12 cookies.
